title: 10 best herbal capsules for chronic bronchitis

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because of its unique composition. The plant's extract is rich in saponins, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate the chronic inflammation and mucus production associated with bronchitis. Additionally, maidenhair tree contains antioxidants that may help protect the lungs from further damage and promote healing. By reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, these capsules may provide relief for individuals suffering from chronic bronchitis and improve their overall respiratory health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: These capsules contain flavonoids, which reduce inflammation in the airways, helping to alleviate symptoms such as coughing and wheezing.
Antioxidant properties: The capsules' antioxidant compounds neutralize free radicals, protecting the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by chronic bronchitis.
Expectorant properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain mucilages that help loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to cough up and reducing congestion.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids (Quercetin and Kaempferol): These polyphenolic compounds help alleviate chronic bronchitis by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the airways, promoting mucus clearance and improving lung function.

Terpenoids (Ginkgolides and Bilobalide): These diterpenoids have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help protect the lungs from oxidative damage, reduce inflammation, and improve airway function in patients with chronic bronchitis.

Bilobalane: This triterpenoid compound has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation in the airways, improve lung function, and alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are commonly used due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
Seeds: They are often used as they contain ginkgolides and bilobalide, which have anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidative effects that can help with bronchitis symptoms.
Roots: They are sometimes used as they have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help soothe and protect the respiratory system.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30-50 pounds of ginkgo biloba leaves from mature trees in late autumn when leaves are golden yellow.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm dry place for 7-14 days at 70-80°f.
Grind 10 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Mix the powder with gelatin or vegetable cellulose in a ratio of 1:1 using 5 grams of each.
Fill gelatin or vegetable cellulose capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filling machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain a potent anti-inflammatory compound called triterpene saponins. These compounds have been shown to reduce inflammation and swelling in the airways, which can help alleviate symptoms such as coughing and shortness of breath. Additionally, Kansas coneflower's antimicrobial properties can help combat infections that exacerbate chronic bronchitis, further reducing congestion and respiratory distress.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Kansas Coneflower contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and terpenes, which help reduce inflammation in the airways and alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis.

Expectorant properties: The plant's saponins have expectorant properties, which means they help loosen and remove mucus from the respiratory tract, making it easier to breathe and cough up excess phlegm.

Antiviral and antimicrobial activity: Kansas Coneflower has antiviral and antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections caused by viruses and bacteria, which are common triggers of chronic bronchitis.
remedy_constituents: Iridoid Glycosides: These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and combat infections in the airways, alleviating symptoms of chronic bronchitis.

Alkylamides: Alkylamides in Echinacea angustifolia have been shown to have immunomodulatory effects, enhancing the body's immune response to fight off infections and reducing inflammation in the respiratory tract, making it easier to breathe.

Polysaccharides: Polysaccharides in Echinacea angustifolia have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, promoting healing and reducing symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Echinacea angustifolia are commonly used because they contain a high concentration of bioactive compounds, including alkylamides and polyacetylenes, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects.
Roots: The roots are also used for their potential to help reduce inflammation and combat infections, which can be beneficial for chronic bronchitis sufferers.
Roots: Additionally, the roots may help to boost the body's immune system, reducing the severity and frequency of bronchitis episodes.
remedy_recipe: Collect 250 grams of dried roots of echinacea angustifolia in bulk.
Crush the dried roots using a mortar and pestle into a fine powder.
Mix 10 grams of the powdered root with 20 grams of vegetable cellulose powder.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture using an encapsulation machine.
Store the capsules in a cool dry place for up to two years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Umckaloabo capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain a unique blend of herbal extracts that have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These properties help to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier for patients to breathe and cough up mucus. Additionally, umckaloabo's expectorant properties help to thin and loosen mucus, making it easier to expel from the lungs. By addressing the root causes of chronic bronchitis, these capsules can help to alleviate symptoms such as wheezing, coughing, and shortness of breath, allowing patients to breathe easier and enjoy a better quality of life.
remedy_properties: Mucolytic activity: UmckaLoabo's mucolytic properties help break down mucus, making it easier to expel and reducing congestion in the airways, which is particularly beneficial for people with chronic bronchitis.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects: UmckaLoabo's antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, which can exacerbate bronchitis symptoms such as coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath.
Expectorant properties: UmckaLoabo's expectorant properties help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs and airways, making it easier to breathe and reducing coughing fits.
remedy_constituents: Ursolic Acid: Ursolic acid, a triterpenoid constituent, helps alleviate chronic bronchitis symptoms by exhibiting anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce inflammation and congestion in the airways.

Pelargonin: Pelargonin, a phenolic constituent, helps combat chronic bronchitis by possessing antioxidant properties, which neutralize free radicals and protect the respiratory system from oxidative stress.

Rosmarinic Acid: Rosmarinic acid, a phenolic acid constituent, helps with chronic bronchitis by exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote the healing of the respiratory tract.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used due to their high content of bioactive compounds, particularly polyphenols and tannins, which contribute to their medicinal properties.
Leaves: The leaves are used for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
Stems: The stems are used due to their similar bioactive compound content to roots, providing additional medicinal benefits for chronic bronchitis treatment.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried pelargonium sidoides roots with a 1:2 root to herb ratio at 2 pm.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the powder with 100g of cornstarch in a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Use a capsule filling machine to fill 100 capsules with 250mg of the mixture each.
Store the filled capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Frankincense capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain Boswellia serrata, a natural anti-inflammatory agent that reduces inflammation in the airways. By decreasing swelling and irritation, frankincense capsules ease congestion and coughing associated with chronic bronchitis. Additionally, the herb's expectorant properties help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, making it easier to breathe. The capsules also contain antioxidants that protect lung tissue from further damage, promoting overall lung health and reducing symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Frankincense capsules contain boswellic acids, which have anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce inflammation and congestion in the lungs, alleviating symptoms of chronic bronchitis.

Antioxidant property: Frankincense capsules are rich in antioxidants, which help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, reducing inflammation and improving lung function in chronic bronchitis patients.

Mucolytic property: Frankincense capsules contain mucilage, a natural expectorant that helps break down and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to breathe and expel phlegm in people with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_constituents: Acetyl-11-keto-β-boswellic acid (AKBA): AKBA helps with chronic bronchitis by inhibiting the production of inflammatory mediators, thereby reducing inflammation and congestion in the airways.

Boswellic acids: Boswellic acids, particularly AKBA, help with chronic bronchitis by blocking the production of leukotrienes, which are pro-inflammatory molecules that contribute to inflammation and airway constriction.

Terpenoids (specifically, boswellic acids): Terpenoids in Boswellia serrata help with chronic bronchitis by reducing inflammation, modulating the immune response, and improving lung function by increasing forced expiratory volume (FEV1) and forced vital capacity (FVC).
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Boswellia serrata contain compounds like boswellic acids, which are anti-inflammatory and help in reducing inflammation and congestion in the bronchial tubes.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of Boswellia serrata contain similar compounds as the roots, providing anti-inflammatory properties that help in alleviating chronic bronchitis symptoms.

Barks: The barks of Boswellia serrata also contain boswellic acids, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory properties and help in reducing inflammation and congestion associated with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_recipe: Sift 500g of dried boswellia serrata resin through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl.
Combine 200g of tapioca starch and 100g of silica in a small bowl.
Mix the boswellia serrata resin mixture with the starch-silica mixture in a large bowl until well combined.
Fill a gelatin capsule machine with the mixture and form 200 capsules at 500mg each.
Label and package the boswellia serrata capsules in an airtight container for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties. This ingredient helps to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier for patients to breathe. Additionally, licorice root extract is known to have mucolytic effects, breaking down mucus and reducing its thickness, allowing for easier coughing up of phlegm. By addressing both inflammation and mucus buildup, herbal licorice capsules can help alleviate the symptoms of chronic bronchitis, providing relief from wheezing, coughing, and shortness of breath.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This property helps to reduce inflammation and alleviate coughing by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals in the body, which can exacerbate bronchial constriction.
Flavonoids: These antioxidants help to protect the lungs from further damage caused by free radicals and oxidative stress, which is often present in chronic bronchitis patients.

Saponins: Saponins, particularly glycyrrhizin, have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, helping to loosen mucus and reduce congestion in the airways, making it easier to breathe.
remedy_constituents: Glycyrrhizin: Helps with chronic bronchitis by reducing inflammation in the airways and suppressing the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which contribute to the development of bronchitis symptoms.

Liquiritigenin: Acts as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the airways, alleviating symptoms of chronic bronchitis such as coughing and wheezing.
Licoricidin: Exhibits expectorant properties, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to breathe and reducing the severity of chronic bronchitis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help in relieving bronchial congestion and inflammation associated with chronic bronchitis.
Leaves: They are used for their antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which help in soothing bronchial spasms and promoting the removal of mucus in chronic bronchitis.
Roots: They are also used for their licorice flavor, which helps in masking the bitter taste of other medications and improving the palatability of the capsules for patients with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 dried roots of glycyrrhiza glabra with an average diameter of 1.5 cm in a clean area.
Crush 150 grams of the harvested roots into fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 1 gram of the powdered root with 5 grams of gelatin in a clean bowl for 5 minutes.
Add 10 milliliters of distilled water to the gelatin mixture and heat it in a double boiler for 15 minutes.
Allow the mixture to cool and solidify before cutting it into capsules using a machine for 5 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because of their ability to promote lung health and reduce inflammation. The herb's antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe the airways, reducing coughing and wheezing symptoms associated with bronchitis. Additionally, dandelion's natural expectorant properties help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, making it easier to breathe. This natural approach can provide relief for those struggling with chronic bronchitis, helping to improve lung function and overall quality of life.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Dandelion capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds like taraxasterol, which can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the airways, making it easier to breathe.

Expectorant properties: The saponins present in dandelion capsules have expectorant properties, which can help loosen and remove mucus from the lungs, relieving congestion and coughing associated with chronic bronchitis.

Antioxidant activity: Dandelion contains antioxidants like kaempferol, which can help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, reducing inflammation and improving overall respiratory health.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant compounds help alleviate chronic bronchitis symptoms by reducing inflammation and improving lung function, making it easier to breathe.
Taraxasterol: This triterpene saponin has anti-inflammatory properties, which help in reducing the severity of chronic bronchitis symptoms such as coughing and shortness of breath.

Taraxasterol and other triterpenoid saponins: These compounds have been shown to exhibit expectorant properties, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs and airways, making it easier to breathe.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that help relieve chronic bronchitis symptoms.

Roots: The roots of Taraxacum officinale contain bitter compounds and saponins that have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, including bronchitis, due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.

Seeds: The seeds of Taraxacum officinale are used to make capsules due to their high content of taraxasterol, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help alleviate chronic bronchitis symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest taraxacum officinale roots and leaves in late summer when they are at their peak potency for maximum benefits.
Dry the harvested taraxacum officinale roots and leaves in a single layer at 35 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind the dried taraxacum officinale roots and leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix 1 gram of the taraxacum officinale powder with 1 gram of gelatin and 1 tablespoon of water to form a paste.
Fill 10-12 empty gelatin capsules with the taraxacum officinale paste using a syringe and store them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling and congestion in the airways. The herbal extract also has expectorant properties, making it easier for the body to expel mucus and other debris from the lungs. Additionally, fennel's natural bronchodilating effects can help to relax airway muscles, improving breathing and reducing symptoms such as wheezing and coughing. This holistic approach can provide relief from chronic bronchitis and improve overall lung health.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic properties: Fennel capsules can help relax and calm bronchial spasms, reducing coughing fits and relieving discomfort associated with chronic bronchitis.
Expectorant properties: Fennel's mucilaginous coating helps to loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to expel and alleviating congestion symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Fennel capsules contain compounds that help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, which can help alleviate chronic bronchitis symptoms such as coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Anethole: Anethole, a terpene found in Foeniculum vulgare, helps to thin mucus and reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe for individuals with chronic bronchitis.

Phenolic acids (e.g. ferulic acid): Phenolic acids present in Foeniculum vulgare have antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, thereby alleviating symptoms of chronic bronchitis.

Foeniculin: Foeniculin, a sesquiterpene found in Foeniculum vulgare, has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation in the airways and alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis, such as coughing and difficulty breathing.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are used due to their carminative and expectorant properties, which help relieve bronchitis symptoms by facilitating mucus expulsion and reducing inflammation.
Leaves: They are used due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help reduce inflammation and combat underlying infections that contribute to chronic bronchitis.
Stems: They are used due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help protect the respiratory system from oxidative stress and inflammation associated with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of dried foeniculum vulgare leaves and flowers from a trusted source by checking the color and texture.
Grind the dried foeniculum vulgare leaves and flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the powder with 1/2 teaspoon of a natural binding agent like gum arabic in a bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the powder mixture using a small spoon and capsule filler for 10 minutes.
Store the herbal capsules in a cool dark place for up to 2 years in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce swelling in the airways and relieve congestion. The soothing effects of chamomile also help to calm the respiratory system, making it easier to breathe and reducing coughing spasms. Additionally, chamomile's natural antioxidants help to protect the lungs from further damage caused by chronic bronchitis. By promoting relaxation and reducing inflammation, chamomile capsules can provide relief from persistent coughing and wheezing associated with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as apigenin and luteolin, help reduce inflammation in the airways, which alleviates symptoms like coughing and shortness of breath.

Antispasmodic properties: The flavonoids present in chamomile capsules relax smooth muscle tissues, reducing spasms in the bronchial tubes and easing coughs and wheezing associated with chronic bronchitis.
Antioxidant properties: Chamomile's antioxidant compounds neutralize free radicals that can damage lung tissue, protecting against oxidative stress and promoting overall respiratory health.
remedy_constituents: Apigenin: This flavonoid acts as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, helping to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the airways, which can contribute to chronic bronchitis symptoms.

Alpha-bisabolol: This sesquiterpene has anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory properties, which can help relax airway muscles, reduce inflammation, and make breathing easier for individuals with chronic bronchitis.

Luteolin: This flavonoid has anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which can help regulate the immune response and reduce inflammation in the airways, providing relief from chronic bronchitis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers of Matricaria chamomilla are used due to their high concentration of apigenin and luteolin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe the respiratory system.
Leaves: The leaves are used for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce inflammation and fight off infections in the respiratory tract.

Seeds: The seeds are used due to their high concentration of chamazulene, which has anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that can help relieve congestion and coughs associated with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers from a clean and organic source.
Dry the harvested flowers in a dehydrator at 40c for 2 hours.
Use a mortar and pestle to grind 50g of the dried flowers into a fine powder.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with 0.5g of the powdered matricaria chamomilla.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for 6 months.

The capsules work by reducing inflammation in the airways and lungs, which can help relieve coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath associated with chronic bronchitis. By calming the bronchial tubes and alleviating congestion, goldenrod capsules may also help reduce mucus production and ease chest tightness, providing welcome relief for individuals struggling with this chronic condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Goldenrod's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and polyphenols, help reduce inflammation in the airways and lungs, alleviating symptoms like coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath.

Expectorant properties: Goldenrod contains mucilages and other saponins that help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, making it easier to cough up and relieving congestion in people with chronic bronchitis.

Antioxidant properties: Goldenrod's antioxidants, including vitamin C and flavonoids, help protect lung tissue from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate chronic bronchitis symptoms.
remedy_constituents: Phenolic acids: These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation and congestion in the airways associated with chronic bronchitis.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 30-40 grams of solidago virgaurea leaves and flowers at peak potency in summer months.
Dry the harvested plant material in a low-temperature dehydrator at 40 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind 15 grams of dried solidago virgaurea into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix the powder with 5 grams of vegetable cellulose and 1 gram of silica in a bowl.
Fill 100 vegetarian capsules with the powder mixture and seal with a capsule filler machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain extracts of Sambucus nigra, which has natural expectorant properties that help loosen and clear mucus from the airways. This relief reduces inflammation and congestion, making it easier to breathe. The antiviral and antibacterial compounds in elderberry also combat underlying infections that can exacerbate bronchitis symptoms, promoting a faster recovery and reduced frequency of attacks.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Elderberry's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, which can exacerbate chronic bronchitis symptoms.
Mucilage Content: The mucilages in elderberry capsules soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the respiratory tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with chronic bronchitis.

Immunomodulatory Effects: Elderberry's immunomodulatory properties may help boost the immune system's response to respiratory infections, such as bronchitis, by increasing the production of antibodies and activating natural killer cells.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These compounds possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the airways associated with chronic bronchitis.

Phenolic acids (e.g., ferulic acid, caffeic acid): These acids have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help combat infections and reduce inflammation in the respiratory tract.

Sambunigrin and other glycosides: These compounds have been found to possess bronchodilatory and expectorant properties, which can help relax airway muscles and facilitate the expulsion of mucus, making it easier to breathe.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers are used to make capsules for chronic bronchitis because they are rich in flavonoids and glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, helping to relieve bronchial congestion.

Fruits (Berries): The fruits are used to make capsules for chronic bronchitis because they contain anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function.

Leaves: The leaves are used to make capsules for chronic bronchitis because they contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that help to soothe and clear bronchial passages.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 part of sambucus nigra berries by hand when they are ripe and dark purple in color.
Dry the berries in a single layer at 50-60 degrees celsius for 8 hours to remove moisture.
Weigh out 250 milligrams of the dried berries and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the powdered sambucus nigra berries for a single dose.
Store the herbal capsules in a cool dry place for up to 12 months to preserve potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Comfrey capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain allantoin, a natural compound that soothes and protects the mucous membranes in the lungs. Allantoin reduces inflammation, calms coughing spasms, and loosens mucus, making it easier to expel. Additionally, comfrey's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress and promote healing in the respiratory tract, addressing the underlying causes of chronic bronchitis. As a result, herbal comfrey capsules can provide long-term relief from chronic bronchitis symptoms, allowing sufferers to breathe more easily and enjoy improved overall health.
remedy_properties: Allantoin: Comfrey contains allantoin, which helps to promote tissue repair and reduce inflammation in the airways, relieving symptoms of chronic bronchitis such as coughing and wheezing.

N-Acetylcysteine (NAC): NAC is a powerful antioxidant found in comfrey that helps to break down mucus and reduce its viscosity, making it easier to expel and alleviating congestion and coughing associated with chronic bronchitis.
Inositol: Inositol, a B-complex vitamin present in comfrey, has anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce airway inflammation and improve lung function in individuals with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in allantoin, a potent anti-inflammatory agent that helps to reduce inflammation and soothe airway irritation associated with chronic bronchitis.
Rhizomes: High in mucilage, a thick, protective substance that coats the throat and lungs, reducing discomfort and coughing caused by bronchial congestion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried symphytum officinale leaves from a reputable supplier or grow your own plant.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 500 milligrams of the powdered symphytum officinale with 250 milligrams of glycerin in a small bowl.
Fill empty capsules with the herbal mixture using a capsule filler machine, yielding 100 capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for up to two years in a cool, dry place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Coltsfoot capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain the herb Tussilago farfara, which has been traditionally used to soothe and calm irritated respiratory tissues. The capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling in the airways, making it easier for people with chronic bronchitis to breathe. Additionally, coltsfoot's natural expectorant properties loosen and clear out mucus and phlegm from the lungs, helping to ease congestion and coughs associated with this condition. Regular use of coltsfoot capsules may help alleviate symptoms and improve overall respiratory health.
remedy_properties: Mucilage: Coltsfoot's mucilage helps to soothe and protect the respiratory tract, reducing inflammation and irritation caused by chronic bronchitis.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: The plant contains anti-inflammatory compounds like saponins, which help to reduce swelling and ease congestion in the airways, making breathing easier for people with chronic bronchitis.
Expectorant properties: Coltsfoot's expectorant properties help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, making it easier to cough up phlegm and relieve symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that help soothe and clear congestion in the lungs.
Rhyzomes: Contain bioactive compounds like flavonoids and polyphenols that help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh tussilago farfara leaves in early spring when they are most potent and free of contaminants.
Dry the harvested leaves using a food dehydrator on low heat for 24 hours or until brittle.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered tussilago farfara with 500mg of gelatin capsule filler in a ratio of 1:5 and fill capsules using a capsule machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for up to 6 months at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Japanese honeysuckle capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids that have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These compounds help to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe and reducing coughing fits. Additionally, the capsules' natural soothing effects can help to calm irritated air passages, allowing for improved airflow and reduced wheezing. As a result, Japanese honeysuckle capsules may provide relief from the persistent cough, shortness of breath, and fatigue associated with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory activity: Japanese Honeysuckle capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and saponins, which can help reduce inflammation in the airways and ease symptoms of chronic bronchitis.

Antitussive and expectorant properties: The capsule's active ingredients, such as linarin and chalcones, have been shown to suppress coughing and help loosen mucus, making it easier to expel from the lungs and airways.

Antioxidant activity: Japanese Honeysuckle capsules contain antioxidant compounds like quercetin and kaempferol, which can help protect lung tissue from oxidative stress and damage caused by chronic bronchitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Containing saponins and phenolic compounds, the roots are believed to have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce airway inflammation in chronic bronchitis patients.

Barks: Rich in flavonoids and terpenes, the barks are thought to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis such as coughing and wheezing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh lonicera japonica flowers and leaves from a trusted source according to local regulations.
Dry the plant material using a food dehydrator at 35°c for 3-4 hours or sun drying for 7-10 days.
Crush 20g of dried lonicera japonica into fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder.
Mix 5g of the powdered herb with 50ml of cold water to create an infusion, allowing it to steep for 30 minutes.
Fill empty capsules with 500mg of the cooled infusion liquid and seal tightly for storage and consumption at a dosage of 3-4 capsules thrice daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rue capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain a potent combination of natural ingredients that work together to alleviate symptoms. The herb rue, in particular, has been traditionally used to ease coughs and reduce inflammation in the airways, helping to open up constricted passageways and make breathing easier. Additionally, other herbs like marshmallow root and licorice root provide anti-inflammatory properties, further supporting bronchial health and reducing discomfort associated with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_properties: Cytotoxic and anti-inflammatory compounds: Rue contains cytotoxins that can help reduce inflammation in the airways and combat the underlying cause of chronic bronchitis, allowing for easier breathing and reduced symptoms.

Antispasmodic properties: Rue's antispasmodic properties can help relax the smooth muscles in the airways, reducing spasms and constrictions that can exacerbate chronic bronchitis symptoms such as wheezing, coughing, and shortness of breath.
Expectorant effects: Rue's expectorant properties can help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, making it easier to cough up and reducing congestion and respiratory difficulty.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in reducing inflammation and soothing coughs associated with chronic bronchitis.
Rhyzomes: Containing bioactive compounds that help reduce mucus production, ease congestion, and alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
Barks: Showcasing a unique combination of flavonoids and phenolic acids that work synergistically to combat bronchial constriction and oxidative stress.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality ruta graveolens leaves and flowers in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 12 hours or air dry it for 2 weeks.
Combine 20g of dried ruta graveolens with 40g of powdered gum arabic and grind into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Mix 500mg of the powdered blend with 250ml of water to create a decoction, heating it at 90°c for 15 minutes and then straining through a cheesecloth.
Fill gelatin capsules with the cooled decoction and seal them immediately, storing in an airtight container in a cool dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which effectively reduce inflammation in the airways and ease breathing. The herb's expectorant qualities also help loosen and clear out mucus from the lungs, making it easier to cough up and breathe freely. Additionally, thyme's antimicrobial properties combat infections that can exacerbate chronic bronchitis, promoting overall respiratory health and reducing symptoms such as wheezing, coughing, and shortness of breath.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial properties: Thyme's antimicrobial compounds, such as thymol, help combat bacterial infections that can exacerbate chronic bronchitis, reducing inflammation and promoting healing.

Expectorant properties: Thyme's volatile oils, particularly eucalyptol, loosen mucus in the airways, making it easier to expel, which can relieve congestion and coughing associated with chronic bronchitis.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Thyme contains anti-inflammatory compounds like rosmarinic acid, which may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the lungs, alleviating symptoms such as wheezing and shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Roots: Thyme roots have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, including bronchitis, due to their rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
Buds: The buds of the thyme plant contain concentrated amounts of volatile oils, which are believed to help alleviate bronchial constriction and reduce inflammation in chronic bronchitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh thymus vulgaris leaves from a reputable source in early morning when essential oils are most concentrated.
Clean and dry the harvested leaves by gently rinsing them with distilled water and air-drying for 24 hours.
Prepare the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle, taking approximately 30 minutes to achieve desired consistency.
Mix the powdered thymus vulgaris with 500 mg of vegetable cellulose capsules in a ratio of 1:2 and fill capsules by spooning mixture into each capsule, taking about 20 minutes per batch.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months or until expiration date marked on packaging, ensuring optimal preservation of herbal properties.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild marjoram capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain thymol, a natural compound that has potent anti-inflammatory properties. Thymol has been shown to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier for patients to breathe and alleviate symptoms such as wheezing and coughing. Additionally, wild marjoram's expectorant properties help to loosen and clear out mucus from the lungs, further relieving congestion and discomfort associated with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_properties: Expectorant property: Wild marjoram's expectorant property helps to loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to cough up and relieving congestion in the lungs and chest.

Anti-inflammatory property: The anti-inflammatory compounds in wild marjoram help to reduce inflammation in the airways, which can alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis such as wheezing, coughing, and shortness of breath.

Antioxidant property: Wild marjoram's antioxidant properties help to protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to chronic inflammation and worsening of chronic bronchitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of wild marjoram contain compounds that help to reduce inflammation in the airways, making them effective in treating symptoms of chronic bronchitis.

Barks: The barks of wild marjoram have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe the lungs and alleviate symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh origanum vulgare leaves and dry them in a warm place for at least two weeks.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Combine 250 milligrams of the powdered origanum vulgare with 500 milliliters of boiling water to create a tea.
Allow the mixture to steep for exactly twenty minutes before straining it through a cheesecloth.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the cooled tea and store them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese date capsules helps with chronic bronchitis because they contain a combination of herbs that help to soothe and calm the airways, reducing inflammation and congestion. The capsules' anti-inflammatory properties also help to reduce swelling in the lungs and airways, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, Chinese date capsules are believed to strengthen the lungs' natural defenses against infection, helping to alleviate symptoms such as coughing and wheezing associated with chronic bronchitis. By addressing these underlying causes of chronic bronchitis, Chinese date capsules provide a holistic approach to managing this condition.
remedy_properties: Expectorant property: The capsule's expectorant property helps to loosen and clear out mucus from the airways, making it easier to cough up phlegm and relieving congestion.

Antioxidant properties: Herbal Chinese Date Capsules contain antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, which may contribute to chronic bronchitis symptoms such as coughing and wheezing.

Anti-inflammatory property: The anti-inflammatory compounds in the capsules may help reduce airway inflammation, which is a common characteristic of chronic bronchitis, and alleviate associated symptoms like coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Jujube plant are used to treat respiratory issues like chronic bronchitis due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs.
Rhyzomes: Jujube rhyzomes are rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve lung function in patients with chronic bronchitis.
remedy_recipe: Measure out 2 cups of dried ziziphus jujuba fruit and grind it into a fine powder using an electric grinder.
Combine the powdered ziziphus jujuba with 1 cup of dried licorice root, 3/4 cup of dried ginseng root, and 1/2 cup of dried slippery elm bark in a large bowl.
Mix the herbal blend with 2 tablespoons of honey and 1 tablespoon of glycerin to enhance palatability and absorption.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture using a capsule filler machine, targeting 500mg per capsule.
Store the prepared capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dry place for up to 6 months or refrigerate for longer storage.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for chronic bronchitis are natural supplements made from plant-based ingredients that help alleviate the symptoms of chronic bronchitis, a condition characterized by persistent coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath. These capsules contain herbs such as turmeric, ginger, and thyme that have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it easier to expel mucus from the lungs. For example, Turmeric capsules have been shown to reduce inflammation in the airways, while Ginger capsules can help alleviate coughing and congestion. By using these herbal capsules, individuals with chronic bronchitis can breathe easier, sleep better, and improve their overall quality of life.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to chronic bronchitis that are treated with herbal capsules are asthma, COPD (chronic obstructive pulmonary disease), and pneumonia. Herbs such as Echinacea, Goldenseal, and Garlic have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help alleviate symptoms like wheezing, coughing, and shortness of breath. Other herbs like Licorice root and Marshmallow root soothe irritated airways, reducing inflammation and congestion.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with chronic bronchitis is a blend of Echinacea, Turmeric, and Ginger. Echinacea helps boost the immune system, reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Turmeric contains curcumin, which has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, reducing mucus production and alleviating coughing. Ginger, with its expectorant properties, helps loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, providing relief from congestion and coughing. Together, these herbs promote healing and reduce symptoms of chronic bronchitis.
